MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Fazzi for Dennis Kakoliris (Petitioner).

Mr. Fazzi stated that the Trustee Adrianne Korderos deposited the funds on September 21st and that they will have the receipt ready to be filed within that 15-day window which should be in the next couple of days. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is continued to October 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cases PTR-16-299942 and PTR-16-300239 are related and were heard together.
Appearances: Zack Varanini for and with petitioner Dennis Kakoliris; Denise Chambliss for Fabiola Lara and Frank Grimaldi.

The Court noted that the proposed settlement would result in the minor's funds being placed in a CUTMA account, when under local rules they would need to be placed either in a blocked account or a guardian account. Both counsel agreed that the funds could be placed in a blocked account. The Court granted the petition to approve the settlement, subject to review of the order. The Court stated he would need a revised order providing for the funds being deposited into a blocked account. He further directed that counsel include in the order a provision setting a status hearing regarding the receipt for deposit of funds into the blocked account, to be set a week following close of escrow on the real property in Fairfield, California. The remaining matters were ordered off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Continued To Jan-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Zachary Varanini (via court call) for (petitioner) Dennis Kakoliris.

The Court stated that we are here on the status of responses to the examiner's notes but that it appears that there is a settlement. Mr. Varanini confirmed that the settlement is for this case as well as related case PTR-16-300239. The Court stated that the dismissal is anticipated by January 23, 2017, that it will continue this matter out to that date as well as the petition in the related case and hopes that the Judge who hears the settlement on 12/19/16 will find everything in order. The Petition to Invalidate the Dennis P. Kakoliris Special Needs Trust (case 299942) and the Petition Re Substituted Judgment Trust (case 300239) were continued to January 31, 2017 at 9:00 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Ex Parte App To Approve Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release
